hook: Exercise can be as effective as antidepressants for depression.

script.hook: Did you know exercise can rival antidepressants in treating depression?
beats: A recent meta-analysis found that exercise works about as well as medication for major depression.
Walking and jogging have a medium-to-large effect size, even better than some medications.
However, exercise may not work for everyone, especially those with severe depression.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.

visualPlan: Visual of a person jogging in a park
Graph comparing effect sizes of exercise vs. antidepressants

Text overlay with key takeaway: 'Exercise isn't a cure-all but can be a powerful tool.'
